pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py logic mapping to WordPress standard option 'default_ping_status'
Task description and verifier.py logic mapping to WordPress standard option 'close_comments_for_old_posts'
Task description and verifier.py logic mapping to WordPress standard option 'close_comments_days_old'
Task description and verifier.py logic mapping to WordPress standard option 'comment_max_links'

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated WordPress posts and comments injected dynamically by the setup scripts. The target discussion settings correctly correspond to standard WordPress core options, verified as: 'default_ping_status' must be set to 'closed', 'close_comments_for_old_posts' to '1', 'close_comments_days_old' to '30', and 'comment_max_links' to '1'. Additionally, the agent must leave 'Jane Doe' comment intact.
